original_assertion: assert exists c: int | left <= c < right :: grid[bottom - 1][c] == '*';

attempts.llm_response:
<DAFNY_CODE>
method FindWitness(a: seq<int>, v: int) returns (found: bool)
  requires |a| > 0
  requires exists i :: 0 <= i < |a| && a[i] == v
  ensures found ==> exists i :: 0 <= i < |a| && a[i] == v
{
  found := false;
  var j := 0;
  while j < |a|
    invariant 0 <= j <= |a|
    invariant found ==> exists i :: 0 <= i < |a| && a[i] == v
  {
    if a[j] == v {
      assert 0 <= j < |a| && a[j] == v;
      found := true;
    }
    j := j + 1;
  }
}
